items.requirement: Run every authenticated load scenario against deployed staging and retain thresholded JSON results.
Provision 100 disposable staging tenants, run the exact-cardinality scale scenario, and retain the result.
Retain deployed staging metric, trace, log, dashboard, alert, paging receiver, and delivery evidence.
Execute and retain the two-school isolation matrix against deployed staging.
Retain EAS project linkage, credential validation, signed build, and App Store Connect and Google Play submission evidence.
Publish and verify a signed preview OTA update, then retain production-channel promotion evidence.
Retain a deployed provider-backed onboarding and first-admin invite delivery proof without message secrets.
Retain desktop and mobile browser proof for the public admissions assistant, including consent, uncertainty, locale, and handoff states.
Retain desktop and mobile browser proof for applicant and staff admissions conversion workflows.

Retain desktop and mobile browser proof for journey authoring, activation, provider outcomes, suppression, and unsubscribe completion; deployed email delivery remains independently gated by AURA-18.9.
Retain a real provider-backed governed content run plus desktop and mobile browser proof for policy, grounded briefing, compliance review, independent approval, and the denied publish boundary.
Retain a secret-backed deployed Resend result proving envelope acceptance, persisted sent state, signed webhook correlation, and final delivered status.
Retain secret-backed Twilio staging proof that approved SMS and WhatsApp senders are accepted, delivered, and correlated to persisted provider status without exposing recipients or credentials.
Approve production spend, configure resource sizing and scaling, and retain provider-observed zero-downtime deployment evidence.
Retain Render PITR, deployed backup runs, Object Lock inspection, monitor delivery, and provider-hosted restore and cutover evidence.
Provision an owned custom domain in Render, observe valid certificate issuance, activate it through the verified workflow, and retain deployed HTTPS, exact-origin CORS, and tenant-routing evidence.
Retain deployed Render health, readiness, identity, route, runtime configuration, and non-root proof for the production topology.
Link both Vercel projects, configure production frontend and gateway origins, deploy both applications, and retain successful HTTPS plus exact-origin CORS evidence.
Retain authenticated browser proof for teacher learning analytics across populated, empty, and dependency-failure states.
